 {"id":"DIAL-59s","title":"Log rotation under concurrent load tests","description":"Add tests that verify log rotation works correctly when multiple threads are writing concurrently.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Tests spawn multiple writer threads
2. Tests verify no log entries are lost during rotation
3. Tests verify no corruption occurs
4. Tests verify rotation completes atomically
5. Tests verify correct ordering is preserved
6. Tests stress test with high write volume","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":150,"created_at":"2026-01-27T15:31:24.031934-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-01-27T15:31:24.031934-05:00","labels":["concurrency","logging","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"DIAL-59s","depends_on_id":"DIAL-tnp","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T15:31:24.034297-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel"}]}
 {"id":"DIAL-652","title":"Hardware test documentation","description":"Create documentation explaining how to set up and run hardware tests, and how to record new test fixtures.","acceptance_criteria":"1. README in tests/hardware/ directory
2. Documents hardware requirements
3. Documents recording new fixtures
4. Documents running hardware tests locally
5. Documents CI skip behavior
6. Includes troubleshooting guide","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":60,"created_at":"2026-01-27T15:33:21.134319-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-01-27T15:33:21.134319-05:00","labels":["documentation","hardware","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"DIAL-652","depends_on_id":"DIAL-nmy","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T15:33:21.136595-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel"}]}
 {"id":"DIAL-6hc","title":"Daemon error recovery tests","description":"Add tests that verify the daemon recovers gracefully from various error conditions.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Test verifies recovery from HID device disconnect
2. Test verifies recovery from config file deletion
3. Test verifies recovery from log file permission errors
4. Test verifies daemon retries on transient failures
5. Test verifies appropriate backoff between retries
6. Test verifies error state is logged appropriately","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2026-01-27T15:29:54.604272-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-01-27T15:29:54.604272-05:00","labels":["daemon","error-handling","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"DIAL-6hc","depends_on_id":"DIAL-73g","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T15:29:54.606218-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel"}]}
-{"id":"DIAL-73g","title":"Daemon Behavioral Test Suite","description":"Expand daemon tests from trivial structural tests (3 tests checking equality and defaults) to comprehensive behavioral tests. The daemon module is critical for background operation and currently has the weakest test coverage.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Tests verify daemon lifecycle: start, run, stop, restart
2. Tests verify signal handling behavior (SIGTERM, SIGINT, SIGHUP)
3. Tests verify PID file creation and cleanup
4. Tests verify log file handling during daemon operation
5. Tests verify graceful shutdown behavior
6. Tests verify error recovery scenarios
7. Test count increases from 3 to at least 15","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-27T15:27:09.325326-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-01-27T15:27:09.325326-05:00","labels":["P1","daemon","testing"]}

 {"id":"DIAL-75h","title":"Uninstall cleanup verification tests","description":"Add tests that verify uninstall removes all installed artifacts cleanly.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Tests verify binary is removed
2. Tests verify service files are removed
3. Tests verify option to preserve user config
4. Tests verify option to remove all including config
5. Tests verify no orphaned files remain
6. Tests verify daemon is stopped before uninstall","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":120,"created_at":"2026-01-27T15:31:57.180137-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-01-27T15:31:57.180137-05:00","labels":["install","testing","uninstall"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"DIAL-75h","depends_on_id":"DIAL-fto","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T15:31:57.182149-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel"}]}
 {"id":"DIAL-7c4","title":"Hardware interaction recording system","description":"Create a system to record real hardware interactions for replay in tests.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Recording captures raw HID events
2. Recordings saved to test fixtures
3. Recordings include timestamps
4. Recordings can be replayed deterministically
5. Recording format is documented
6.  {"id":"DIAL-7f6","title":"Daemon signal handling tests","description":"Add tests that verify the daemon handles Unix signals correctly (SIGTERM, SIGINT, SIGHUP).","acceptance_criteria":"1. Test verifies SIGTERM triggers graceful shutdown
2. Test verifies SIGINT triggers graceful shutdown
3. Test verifies SIGHUP triggers config reload
4. Test verifies cleanup completes before exit
5. Test verifies exit codes are appropriate for signal type
6. Test verifies no zombie processes after signal","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":150,"created_at":"2026-01-27T15:29:30.359854-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-01-27T15:29:30.359854-05:00","labels":["daemon","signals","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"DIAL-7f6","depends_on_id":"DIAL-73g","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T15:29:30.362841-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel"}]}
